title: Evidence-ledger human resume review script rebuild | Resume Teardown | Signal by ATSHacker
caption: Evidence-ledger human resume review script rebuild | Resume Teardown. Paste the job description and check your free Signal score before you apply. #jobsearch #resumehelp #careeradvice #resumetips
youtubeTitle: Evidence-ledger human resume review script rebuild | Resume Teardown | Signal by ATSHacker
youtubeDescription: A funny recruiter-style teardown of why a qualified resume can be hard to find, how to translate a job description into resume proof, and where Signal fits without fake claims.

checks: 16:9 layout is readable on desktop and mobile YouTube surfaces.
Opening hook is visible in the first 5 seconds.
Signal mascot or brand mark is visible.
No old human presenter appears unless explicitly approved.
Audio is present, balanced, and not dominated by music or effects.
Claims avoid ATS auto-reject myths, guarantees, fake outcomes, and unsourced competitor rankings.
Thumbnail exists or is intentionally deferred.
Human reviewer approved exact file, title, description, thumbnail, and platform target.

reviewChecklist: exact YouTube title and description reviewed

title: I would circle this line first
